title: Trump is blockading Iranian ports in the Persian Gulf. What does that mean?
summary_full: A former Pentagon official said the goal of the U.S. blockade is to get the Iranians to back down and restore freedom of navigation to the strait.
summary_public: A former Pentagon official said the goal of the U.S. blockade is to get the Iranians to back down and restore freedom of navigation to the strait.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump is blockading Iranian ports in the Persian Gulf.
